commit_scope: Extend BML companion source support from synthetic companion-shaped declarations into whole original companion files for includes and primitive Cut execution.

local_validation.notes: Original companion BMF-includes.bml parses as 28 include declarations with proof result 4095. Original companion primitive-Cut.bml parses as a Cut : Primitive class, lowers System.Cut(...) to BMA cut, runs string-returning methods, and proves forward/backward DO/UNDO trace with proof result 33554431.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Original BML companion source files now enter the Form-native path directly: BMF-includes.bml parses as include declarations and primitive-Cut.bml parses into class/method components whose method bodies execute on native BMA.

phase_gate.reason: Real companion source support is proven locally for BMF-includes.bml and primitive-Cut.bml; CI and production deployment proof are pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-includes-source-proof.fk reads docs/field/urs/artifacts/master-thesis-2000/companion/source-samples/BMF-includes.bml directly and proves 28 file-include declarations.

form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-primitive-cut-source-proof.fk reads docs/field/urs/artifacts/master-thesis-2000/companion/source-samples/primitive-Cut.bml directly and proves class, base, parameters, method bodies, BMA cut execution, and DO/UNDO trace.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk now supports Include components, method parameter accessors, BML string literal lowering, and a BMF rule for the real primitive Cut class source shape.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md keeps BMF-grammar.bml and container-Rule.bml as explicit remaining gaps.
